Doe pitches citywide apartment legalization

By A. Reporter, Example Chicago News

Mayoral candidate Jane Doe said Tuesday she would legalize apartment buildings in every Chicago neighborhood, calling the current zoning map a driver of the city's housing shortage.

"We can't say we want affordability and then ban apartments in half the city," Doe said at a housing forum on the Northwest Side.
